scripts.build: pnpm run clean:generated && pnpm --filter @clover/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @clover/std run build && pnpm --filter @clover/zod run build && pnpm --filter @clover/cli run build && pnpm --filter @clover/eslint-plugin run build
scripts.lint: tsx ./node_modules/eslint/bin/eslint.js packages scripts bench eslint.config.js vitest.config.ts --max-warnings=0
